description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a symmetrical front facade featuring arched windows and a double-door main entrance. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by a tan hip roof and black roof accents. The front includes a double garage, a driveway with a parked car, and landscaped elements such as trees. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a patio area, outdoor furniture, and a fenced-in swimming pool. Multiple sets of large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and access to the outdoor spaces. The architectural style blends Mediterranean and contemporary influences, with clean lines and elegant window arrangements.
description: A spacious two-story white house with a tan hip roof, arched windows, double garage, and a backyard featuring a patio and swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, double garage, main entrance with arched windows, driveway, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof structure, side windows, and the driveway extending to the garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, outdoor furniture, large windows, and a fenced swimming pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hip roof, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway and garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door main entry with arched transom, flanked by columns and small landscaped areas, no porch
